title: 2 Pcs Fodmap Chart, Low Fodmap Diet List, Healthy Foods Nutrition List, Foods To Avoid, Optimizing the Elimination Diet, Food Meal Plan Brochure for Beginners
features: 📋【Essential FODMAP Guide】Detailed charts of FODMAP-friendly foods and substitutes for efficient meal prep and dietary adjustments.
🍴【Beginner’s Meal Solutions】Curated low-FODMAP recipes and meal ideas to simplify balanced eating for newcomers.
🛡️【Long-Lasting Durability】Tri-fold laminated design with glossy surfaces for tear-resistant, daily use.
📈【Track & Optimize Health】Manage low-carb lists, track meals, and improve digestion with nutritional insights.
🎁【Heartfelt Wellness Gift】Promote healthy habits by gifting this guide to loved ones.
description: Product Description Durable laminated FODMAP charts Beginner-focused meal planning tools Diet tracking for digestive wellness Material Glossy laminated paper Colour As shown in the picture Product size 11.81x7.87 inches Weight 100g Application Home kitchens, dietary clinics, wellness workshops, or as a gift for health-conscious individuals. Package Details Set of 2 FODMAP charts, meal plan brochure, and nutrition tracking resources.
